name: Grupo Empresas Navieras S.A.
summary: Grupo Empresas Navieras S.A., through its subsidiaries, provides maritime transport services. The company provides ship agency, cargo, and air transport services; purchases, sells, and rents ships; and invests in port and airport infrastructure. It is also involved in the floated and land transportation businesses; and storage and distribution of products that are related to transportation and cargo services businesses as well as import and export. Grupo Empresas Navieras S.A. was founded in 1930 and is based in Valpara√É¬≠so, Chile.
